demo.title: odyssey-robin-staking.sh
demo.code:
# Check staked ROBIN and pending ETH rewards on Robinhood Chain
bankr agent prompt "On Robinhood Chain (4663), read my $ROBIN balance, staked amount, and pending ETH from Odyssey staking pool 0x9047DCAB97C2CfE20955f6b3Ff7438788AD02a86"

# Stake 1000 ROBIN — approve then stake (pinned addresses only)
bankr agent prompt "On Robinhood Chain chainId 4663: approve exactly 1000 $ROBIN for spender 0x9047DCAB97C2CfE20955f6b3Ff7438788AD02a86, then stake 1000 on that pool. Use only these addresses."

# Claim ETH rewards without unstaking
bankr agent prompt "On Robinhood Chain (4663), call claim() on Odyssey staking pool 0x9047DCAB97C2CfE20955f6b3Ff7438788AD02a86"

setup: Requires Bankr API key with Wallet API + write access; wallet must hold $ROBIN and ETH on RH4663
